name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Renton, WA's Superb Cash Advance storefront at 603 S Grady Way offers fast cash advances and title loans with extended hours seven days a week.
description_long:
Located at 603 S Grady Way in Renton, WA, Superb Cash Advance serves residents looking for quick access to emergency cash. This standalone location operates throughout the week with extended hours—open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, and weekends from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM, making it convenient for Renton locals to stop in when they need fast funding.

Superb Cash Advance in Renton specializes in payday loans and title loans, providing an alternative for those who need immediate funds to cover unexpected expenses. You can reach this location at 425-541-1953 to discuss loan terms, eligibility requirements, and what documents you'll need to bring when you apply.

If you're a Renton, WA resident facing an unexpected expense or cash gap, this location offers a straightforward process—bring your ID, proof of income, and banking information to apply. The storefront on Grady Way is positioned for easy access from the surrounding neighborhoods.
address: 603 S Grady Way b, Renton, WA 98057

company_info.headquarters: 603 S Grady Way b, Renton, WA 98057

pros: Same-day funding available—customers report receiving cash on approval day
No credit check required; accepts all credit types including poor and no-credit borrowers
Extended business hours (until 8:30pm weekdays) accommodate working individuals
Flexible payment scheduling—staff reportedly works with borrowers to customize repayment terms
High loan amounts for category—bad credit product goes up to $50,000
Minimal documentation required for quick approval process
Staff reported as professional, welcoming, and non-judgmental in customer reviews
cons: No APR, fees, or interest rates disclosed on website—total cost of borrowing is completely opaque
Payday and cash advance products historically carry very high APRs (often 400%+ annualized)
Short repayment terms typical in payday lending can trap borrowers in debt cycles
Location discrepancy—reviews mention Arvada location; unclear if website content is current or accurate
No information about regulatory compliance, licensing, or consumer protections
best_for: Consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who cannot access traditional bank loans
Subprime borrowers with poor credit history or no credit file needing fast funds
Individuals who prefer in-person transactions over purely online lending
Workers with irregular schedules who need evening/weekend availability
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for consumers in immediate financial hardship who have exhausted traditional credit options and need same-day cash. Critical caveat: payday and cash advance products carry extremely high costs; borrowers must obtain complete APR and fee information before committing, understand Georgia lending laws, and consider whether the short-term relief justifies the high total cost of borrowing. The lack of transparent pricing on their website is a major red flag.
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 603 S Grady Way, Renton, WA. Fast payday and title loans available—open 7 days a week.
